title: Property getter, setter, and deleter methods should have the expected number of parameters
description: Ensures that property getter, setter, and deleter methods have the expected number of parameters.
message: Property getter, setter, or deleter method has an incorrect number of parameters.
recommendation: Adjust the number of parameters in the method declaration.

noncompliant.description: Getter and setter methods have an incorrect number of parameters.

compliant.description: Getter and setter methods have the expected number of parameters.

why_is_this_an_issue: Misuse of property getter, setter, and deleter methods can lead to incorrect behavior, making the code harder to maintain and understand.
how_to_fix: Adjust the number of parameters in the method declaration to match the expected number.

metadata.title: Property getter, setter, and deleter methods should have the expected number of parameters
